title: Chore: Upgrade Node.js version
original_text: Upgraded Node.js from version 16 to version 18. Updated package.json engines field. Updated CI/CD pipelines to use Node 18. Updated Docker images to use Node 18. Tested all dependencies for compatibility. Fixed deprecated API usage. Updated documentation with Node 18 requirements. Result: all tests pass on Node 18.
expected_subject: chore(runtime): upgrade Node.js from v16 to v18
expected_body_lines: - Validation: all tests pass on Node 18
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(runtime): upgrade Node.js from v16 to v18"
